hooks.command:
echo "STOP: Before using Grep, check if Lattice can answer your question faster:
  lattice context <symbol>  - function neighborhood (callers, callees, flows)
  lattice callers <symbol>  - what calls this function
  lattice flow <name>       - full call tree for a business flow
  lattice impact <symbol>   - what breaks if you change this
Grep is appropriate for: string literals, config values, error messages, TODOs.
Grep is NOT appropriate for: finding function definitions, understanding call chains, tracing flows."

echo "STOP: Before using Glob, check if Lattice can answer your question faster:
  lattice overview          - all flows, boundaries, events in the project
  lattice flows             - all entry points
  lattice boundaries        - all external system calls
  lattice context <symbol>  - where a symbol lives and what it connects to
Glob is appropriate for: config files, assets, non-code files.
Glob is NOT appropriate for: finding source files or function locations."
